system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_kehoach_hangtrang2_getall4","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_KEHOACH_HANGTRANG2_GETALL4]
(
	@trangthai nvarchar(max) = '1,5'
)
AS
BEGIN
	/*
		DP09 : ĐỒNG BỘ PHÔI
		DH06 : ĐỒNG BỘ ĐỊNH HÌNH 1
		DH07 : ĐỒNG BỘ ĐỊNH HÌNH 2
		LR02 : LẮP RÁP HOÀN THIỆN
		NHA01 : NGUỘI
	*/

		-- 1. lấy danh sách các đơn hàng chưa hoàn thành
	SELECT A.maddh, A.mancc, A.ngaydat,
		B.masp, C.tensp, C.hehang, B.soluong, sokhoi_tinhche = B.soluong * C.m3_tc
	INTO #DONDATHANG
	FROM tr_dondathang A
	INNER JOIN tr_dondathang_chitiet B ON A.maddh = B.maddh
	INNER JOIN tr_sanpham C ON B.masp = C.masp
	WHERE A.trangthai NOT IN ('3', '-1') AND A.pheduyet <> '-1'
		AND B.chitiet LIKE 'W%'

	-- 2. lấy thông tin phiếu pallet
	SELECT A.dondathang, A.masp, 
		SUM(DISTINCT A.soluong_donhang) AS soluong_donhang,
		SUM(A.soluong_can) AS soluong_can,
		SUM(A.sokhoi_tinhche) AS sokhoi_tinhche
	INTO #PALLET
	FROM tr_pallet A
	WHERE A.hangbu = 0 AND A.mact <> '000' AND nguyenlieu NOT IN ('', '0') AND A.dondathang IN (SELECT maddh FROM #DONDATHANG)
	GROUP BY A.dondathang, A.masp

	SELECT A.maddh, A.mancc, A.ngaydat,
		A.masp, A.tensp, A.hehang, 
		COALESCE(B.soluong_donhang, A.soluong) AS soluong_donhang,
		COALESCE(B.sokhoi_tinhche, A.sokhoi_tinhche) AS sokhoi_tinhche,
		B.soluong_can AS soluongchitiet_donhang
	INTO #THONGTINDATHANG
	FROM #DONDATHANG A
		LEFT JOIN #PALLET B ON A.maddh = B.dondathang AND A.masp = B.masp

	-- 3. Trạng thái sản xuất
	SELECT A.madonhang, A.masp1, 
		DP09_SL = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'DP09' AND A.mact = '000' THEN A.soluong END),
		DP09_CT = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'DP09' AND A.mact <> '000' THEN A.soluong END),

		DH06_SL = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'DH06' AND A.mact = '000' THEN A.soluong END),
		DH06_CT = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'DH06' AND A.mact <> '000' THEN A.soluong END),

		DH07_SL = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'DH07' AND A.mact = '000' THEN A.soluong END),
		DH07_CT = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'DH07' AND A.mact <> '000' THEN A.soluong END),

		LR02_SL = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'LR02' AND A.mact = '000' THEN A.soluong END),
		LR02_CT = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'LR02' AND A.mact <> '000' THEN A.soluong END),

		NHA01_SL = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'NHA01' AND A.mact = '000' THEN A.soluong END),
		NHA01_CT = SUM(CASE WHEN B.c_op = 'NHA01' AND A.mact <> '000' THEN A.soluong END)
	INTO #THONGKE
	FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat A
		INNER JOIN trtb_m_location B ON A.congdoan = B.c_location
	WHERE B.c_op IN ('DP09', 'DH06', 'DH07', 'LR02', 'NHA01')
		AND A.madonhang IN (SELECT maddh FROM #DONDATHANG)
		AND A.congdoan LIKE '%-PROD'
		--AND A.nguyenlieu NOT IN ('', '0')
	GROUP BY A.madonhang, A.masp1

	SELECT madonhang = COALESCE(B.madonhang, A.maddh),
		madonhang_sort = CONCAT(FORMAT(COALESCE(B.stt, 999), 'D2'), '. ', COALESCE(B.madonhang, A.maddh)),
		A.mancc, A.ngaydat, 
		A.masp, A.tensp, A.hehang, 
		soluong = SUM(DISTINCT A.soluong_donhang),
		sokhoi_tinhche = SUM(DISTINCT COALESCE(B.sokhoi_tinhche, A.sokhoi_tinhche)),
		soluongchitiet_donhang = SUM(DISTINCT A.soluongchitiet_donhang),
		tungay = MIN(B.tungay),
		denngay = MAX(B.denngay),
		DP09_FROM = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'DP09' THEN B.tungay END),
		DP09_TO = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'DP09' THEN B.denngay END),
		DH06_FROM = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'DH06' THEN B.tungay END),
		DH06_TO = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'DH06' THEN B.denngay END),
		DH07_FROM = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'DH07' THEN B.tungay END),
		DH07_TO = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'DH07' THEN B.denngay END),
		LR02_FROM = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'LR02' THEN B.tungay END),
		LR02_TO = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'LR02' THEN B.denngay END),
		NHA01_FROM = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'NHA01' THEN B.tungay END),
		NHA01_TO = MAX(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'NHA01' THEN B.denngay END),
		B.hoanthanh, B.id_trangthai, C.[name] AS trangthai
	INTO #KEHOACH
	FROM #THONGTINDATHANG A
		INNER JOIN tr_kehoach_hangtrang2 B ON A.maddh = B.madonhang AND A.masp = B.masp
		LEFT JOIN ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai C ON B.id_trangthai = C.id
	WHERE COALESCE(B.id_trangthai, 1) IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@trangthai, ','))
	GROUP BY COALESCE(B.madonhang, A.maddh), A.mancc, A.ngaydat, A.masp, A.tensp, A.hehang, B.hoanthanh, B.id_trangthai, C.[name], B.stt
	
	SELECT A.madonhang, A.madonhang_sort, A.mancc, A.ngaydat,
			A.masp, A.tensp, A.hehang,
			A.soluong, A.soluongchitiet_donhang, A.sokhoi_tinhche,
			A.trangthai,
			A.tungay, A.denngay,

			A.DP09_FROM, A.DP09_TO, 
			A.DH06_FROM, A.DH06_TO, 
			A.DH07_FROM, A.DH07_TO, 
			A.LR02_FROM, A.LR02_TO, 
			A.NHA01_FROM, A.NHA01_TO,

			DP09_PER = CASE WHEN A.DP09_CT_PER > A.DP09_SL_PER THEN IIF(A.DP09_CT_PER > 1, 1, A.DP09_CT_PER) ELSE IIF(A.DP09_SL_PER > 1, 1, A.DP09_SL_PER) END * 100,
			DH06_PER = CASE WHEN A.DH06_CT_PER > A.DH06_SL_PER THEN IIF(A.DH06_CT_PER > 1, 1, A.DH06_CT_PER) ELSE IIF(A.DH06_SL_PER > 1, 1, A.DH06_SL_PER) END * 100,
			DH07_PER = CASE WHEN A.DH07_CT_PER > A.DH07_SL_PER THEN IIF(A.DH07_CT_PER > 1, 1, A.DH07_CT_PER) ELSE IIF(A.DH07_SL_PER > 1, 1, A.DH07_SL_PER) END * 100,
			LR02_PER = CASE WHEN A.LR02_CT_PER > A.LR02_SL_PER THEN IIF(A.LR02_CT_PER > 1, 1, A.LR02_CT_PER) ELSE IIF(A.LR02_SL_PER > 1, 1, A.LR02_SL_PER) END * 100,
			NHA01_PER = CASE WHEN A.NHA01_CT_PER > A.NHA01_SL_PER THEN IIF(A.NHA01_CT_PER > 1, 1, A.NHA01_CT_PER) ELSE IIF(A.NHA01_SL_PER > 1, 1, A.NHA01_SL_PER) END * 100
	FROM (
		SELECT A.madonhang, A.madonhang_sort, A.mancc, A.ngaydat,
			A.masp, A.tensp, A.hehang,
			A.soluong, A.soluongchitiet_donhang, A.sokhoi_tinhche,
			A.trangthai,
			A.tungay, A.denngay,

			A.DP09_FROM, A.DP09_TO, 
			A.DH06_FROM, A.DH06_TO, 
			A.DH07_FROM, A.DH07_TO, 
			A.LR02_FROM, A.LR02_TO, 
			A.NHA01_FROM, A.NHA01_TO,
		
			DP09_CT_PER = COALESCE(B.DP09_CT/A.soluongchitiet_donhang, 0),
			DP09_SL_PER = COALESCE(B.DP09_SL/A.soluong, 0),

			DH06_CT_PER = COALESCE(B.DH06_CT/A.soluongchitiet_donhang, 0),
			DH06_SL_PER = COALESCE(B.DH06_SL/A.soluo
-- ... (truncated)","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_kehoach_hangtrang2","dbo.tr_pallet","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_trangthai_sanxuat","dbo.trtb_m_location"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
